description: Query references a table not present in the catalogue. Produces Q003 for the unknown table, cascading Q001 for unresolvable output columns, and Q009 for command/output mismatch. Q004 (parameter type) is suppressed because the analyser's catalogue fallback finds users.id as the unique match for the bare column id and infers the parameter type from there; the user already sees Q003 telling them the table is wrong.
